highlights: ADC Items Rework: Infinity Edge and Navori Quickblades adjustments.
Jungle changes: Experience tweaks and camp respawn timers.
System updates: Turret plating gold reduced.

S.reason: High mobility and burst with Malignance.
Incredible late-game scaling with the new crit items.
Reliable lockdown and early game skirmishing.

A.reason: Strong lane dominance and teamfight drain tanking.
